title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.
title_es: OpenAI presenta Daybreak: herramientas para asegurar organizaciones
bajada: OpenAI lanzó Daybreak, un conjunto de herramientas que incluye Codex Security y GPT-5.5-Cyber para ayudar a las organizaciones a encontrar, validar y parchear vulnerabilidades a escala. Esta iniciativa responde a la creciente demanda de seguridad en la cadena de suministro de software.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched Daybreak, a suite of tools including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale. This initiative addresses growing demand for software supply chain security.

title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.
title_es: OpenAI apoya mantenedores open-source con 'Patch the Planet'
bajada: OpenAI anunció Patch the Planet, una iniciativa que proporciona a los mantenedores de software open-source herramientas basadas en IA y revisión de expertos para encontrar y corregir vulnerabilidades. El programa busca fortalecer la seguridad del ecosistema open-source global.
bajada_en: OpenAI announced Patch the Planet, an initiative providing open-source maintainers with AI-powered tools and expert review to find and fix vulnerabilities. The program aims to strengthen the security of the global open-source ecosystem.

title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
title_es: Hugging Face presenta CUGA para aplicaciones agentic
bajada: Hugging Face publicó CUGA, un framework ligero con dos docenas de ejemplos funcionales para construir aplicaciones agentic. La herramienta facilita a los developers crear sistemas de agentes confiables sobre una arquitectura simplificada.
bajada_en: Hugging Face released CUGA, a lightweight framework with two dozen working examples for building agentic applications. The tool helps developers create reliable agent systems on a simplified architecture.

title: How Businesses Are Building Specialized AI They Can Trust
summary: Companies are asking how to build specialized AI that fits with the way their workflows actually run.  The first wave of enterprise AI was about access. Companies experimented with new frontier and open models, ran pilots and explored how AI can help.  Now, specialized agents — systems of models that can reason, use tools and […]
title_es: NVIDIA sobre especialización de IA empresarial de confianza
bajada: NVIDIA publicó cómo las empresas están construyendo sistemas de IA especializados que se adaptan a sus flujos de trabajo reales. La propuesta destaca la transición desde experimentación con modelos frontales a agentes autónomos con razonamiento y uso de herramientas.
bajada_en: NVIDIA published how enterprises are building specialized AI systems tailored to their actual workflows. The post highlights the shift from experimenting with frontier models to autonomous agents with reasoning and tool use.

title: NVIDIA Brings Trusted, 24/7 AI Agents to Telecom Operations
summary: Telecom operators have seen remarkable returns from using generative AI to automate network management, customer care and back-office operations. Most of that impact has been task‑based: automation that speeds up predetermined steps while people manually correlate insights and direct next steps. Automation is no longer the finish line — it’s the launchpad to autonomy.  The […]
title_es: NVIDIA despliega agentes IA autónomos en operaciones telecom
bajada: NVIDIA anunció soluciones de agentes IA confiables y disponibles 24/7 para operadores de telecomunicaciones. Estas soluciones evolucionan desde automatización de tareas predefinidas hacia autonomía real en gestión de redes y operaciones back-office.
bajada_en: NVIDIA announced trusted, 24/7 AI agents for telecom operators to automate network management and back-office operations. The solutions evolve from task-based automation toward real autonomy in telecom operations.

title: OpenAI launches new initiative to help find and patch open source bugs
summary: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community better protect itself.
title_es: OpenAI usa IA para proteger la comunidad open-source
bajada: OpenAI lanzó una iniciativa que utiliza IA para ayudar a la comunidad open-source a encontrar y parchear vulnerabilidades de seguridad. El proyecto refuerza los esfuerzos de protección de la cadena de suministro de software global.
bajada_en: OpenAI launched an initiative using AI to help the open-source community find and patch security vulnerabilities. The project strengthens efforts to protect the global software supply chain.

title: OpenAI Launches Full-Scale Effort to Patch Open-Source Bugs as It Takes on Anthropic’s Mythos
summary: Amid concerns about AI models’ cybersecurity capabilities, OpenAI revealed an improved version of GPT-5.5-Cyber and its “Patch the Planet” initiative to fix open-source software bugs.
title_es: GPT-5.5-Cyber mejorado frente a riesgos de ciberseguridad
bajada: OpenAI presentó una versión mejorada de GPT-5.5-Cyber en respuesta a preocupaciones sobre las capacidades de ciberseguridad de modelos de IA. La iniciativa busca equilibrar la potencia de los modelos con medidas preventivas de seguridad.
bajada_en: OpenAI presented an improved version of GPT-5.5-Cyber addressing concerns about AI models' cybersecurity capabilities. The initiative balances model power with security safeguards.

title: NVIDIA Powers Over 400 of the World’s 500 Fastest Supercomputers
summary: News Highlights: NVIDIA technology runs 81% of the TOP500 and 90% of the systems new to the list. 26 systems on the TOP500 adopted the NVIDIA Grace CPU, up eight from the previous list. The top eight systems on the Green500 run on NVIDIA GPUs and nine of the top 10 use NVIDIA technologies. No. […]
title_es: NVIDIA domina supercomputadoras globales con 81% del TOP500
bajada: NVIDIA anunció que su tecnología impulsa el 81% de los sistemas TOP500 y el 90% de los nuevos equipos de la lista. La cifra refleja la consolidación de NVIDIA como proveedor de infraestructura esencial para computación de IA global.
bajada_en: NVIDIA announced its technology powers 81% of TOP500 systems and 90% of newly listed supercomputers. The figure reflects NVIDIA's consolidation as the essential infrastructure provider for global AI computing.

title: Specifying AI-SDLC Processes: A Protocol Language for Human-Agent Boundaries
summary:
arXiv:2606.20615v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: AI agents now participate as first-class team members across the software development lifecycle, yet no specification language exists for expressing the human-agent responsibility boundaries, approval gates, and governance constraints this collaboration requires. Existing approaches encode process in agent prompts (subject to drift), target adjacent domains (workflow management, business processes), or address only fragments (access control, approval gates).
  We propose a domain-specific language for specifying AI-SDLC processes as protocols, with formal syntax, well-formedness conditions, operational semantics, and enforcement invariants. The language distinguishes policy (declared intent) from mechanism (structural enforcement), enabling implementations to bound process non-determinism through primitives such as validation tokens and capability boundaries.
  Three results follow. A failure rate analysis shows that structural enforcement bounds system failure rates at a weighted product of agent and validator rates, while behavioral compliance permits cumulative or near-saturating growth. The 2+N team pattern (two human-in-control roles plus N specialized agent members) formalizes classical Separation of Duties for AI-SDLC. Kleene closure of orchestration loops and reflexive protocol-adherence validation emerge as design properties rather than special-case constructs.
  We position the contribution against multi-agent frameworks (MetaGPT), workflow specification (FlowAgent, BPMN extensions), and capability-based security (SAGA): the novelty lies in the specific integration, not any single primitive. A working implementation demonstrates feasibility; empirical evaluation is future work.
title_es: Lenguaje de especificación para gobernanza de agentes en desarrollo
bajada: Investigadores propusieron un lenguaje específico de dominio para definir procesos AI-SDLC con límites claros entre responsabilidades humanas y de agentes. El trabajo aborda la necesidad de formalizar gobernanza en equipos donde agentes IA participan como miembros de primer nivel.
bajada_en: Researchers proposed a domain-specific language for defining AI-SDLC processes with clear boundaries between human and agent responsibilities. The work addresses the need for formal governance in teams where AI agents participate as first-class members.

title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
title_es: Hugging Face automatiza su CI/CD con IA e intervención humana
bajada: Hugging Face compartió cómo implementó un ciclo de lanzamiento semanal de huggingface_hub combinando automatización con IA y validación manual. El enfoque demuestra cómo mantener calidad y velocidad en proyectos de gran escala.
bajada_en: Hugging Face shared how it implemented a weekly release cycle for huggingface_hub combining AI automation with manual validation. The approach demonstrates how to maintain quality and speed in large-scale projects.

title: Fika Jobs raises $4M to build a video-first hiring platform where AI agents interview candidates
summary: Stockholm-based startup Fika Jobs is building a video-first hiring platform that combines AI interview agents with short-form video profiles, creating something that feels like a cross between LinkedIn and TikTok.
title_es: Fika Jobs recauda $4M para plataforma de entrevistas con IA
bajada: Fika Jobs, startup de Estocolmo, consiguió $4 millones para desarrollar una plataforma de hiring video-first donde agentes IA realizan entrevistas. La solución combina perfiles de video cortos con evaluación automática, transformando el proceso de selección de personal.
bajada_en: Stockholm-based Fika Jobs raised $4M to develop a video-first hiring platform with AI agents conducting interviews. The solution combines short-form video profiles with automated evaluation, transforming recruitment workflows.

title: OpenAI DayBreak – GPT-5.5-Cyber
summary: Article URL:https://openai.com/index/daybreak-securing-the-world/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48639063Points: 159# Comments: 122
title_es: Daybreak de OpenAI genera interés en la comunidad tech
bajada: El lanzamiento de OpenAI Daybreak y GPT-5.5-Cyber generó 159 puntos y 122 comentarios en Hacker News, indicando alto interés entre developers sobre herramientas de seguridad de IA. La comunidad considera relevantes estas iniciativas para la infraestructura de software.
bajada_en: OpenAI's Daybreak and GPT-5.5-Cyber launch generated 159 points and 122 comments on Hacker News, showing high developer interest in AI security tools. The community finds these initiatives relevant for software infrastructure.

title: The Download: the future of chipmaking and Anthropic’s government clash
summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. The $400 million machine powering the future of chipmaking It’s a bit of a schlep to get to the top of ASML’s newest machine. It’s about the size of a double-decker…
title_es: Futuro de la fabricación de chips y conflictos regulatorios
bajada: MIT Tech Review cubrió desarrollos en la fabricación avanzada de chips (incluyendo máquinas de $400 millones de ASML) y tensiones regulatorias entre gobiernos y empresas como Anthropic. Los temas reflejan competencia geopolítica en infraestructura de IA.
bajada_en: MIT Tech Review covered advances in chip fabrication (including ASML's $400M machines) and regulatory tensions between governments and AI companies like Anthropic. The topics reflect geopolitical competition in AI infrastructure.

title: PEAR: Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate
summary:
arXiv:2606.20621v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Multi-agent debate improves the reliability of large language models (LLMs) through iterative peer critiques. However, fixed topologies often introduce persistent positional biases, amplify unreliable agents, and cause high sensitivity to role assignments. We introduce \textit{Permutation-Equivariant Adaptive Routing Multi-Agent Debate (PEAR)}, an inference-time protocol that dynamically reconfigures communication roles and sparse topologies across consecutive debate rounds. By strategically switching agent-to-role assignments based on evolving agent states, PEAR prevents any agent from permanently occupying a privileged network position or distributes influence more evenly across the debate. We theoretically characterize PEAR as an equivariant sparse router: it preserves accuracy under agent relabeling while reducing routing complexity and improving generalization. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across four reasoning benchmarks and six diverse LLM backbones demonstrate PEAR significantly improves average accuracy over the strongest debate baselines. The code is at https://github.com/EVIEHub/PEAR.
title_es: PEAR: debate multi-agente sin sesgos posicionales
bajada: Investigadores presentaron PEAR, un protocolo que evita sesgos posicionales en debates multi-agente reconfigurando dinámicamente roles y topologías. El método mejora significativamente la precisión en benchmarks de razonamiento comparado con baselines de debate existentes.
bajada_en: Researchers introduced PEAR, a protocol that prevents positional biases in multi-agent debates by dynamically reconfiguring roles and topologies. The method significantly improves accuracy across reasoning benchmarks compared to existing debate baselines.

title: Less is More: Lightweight Prompt Compression for Question Answering Applications on Edge Devices
summary:
arXiv:2606.20571v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: In agent-driven question answering (QA) applications, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is commonly introduced to enhance the response accuracy of large language models (LLMs) by providing additional context. Due to the inherent noise in retrieval results and the coarse granularity of document-level retrieval, the retrieved context often contains substantial redundant information. In this setting, the agent prompt, consisting of the user query and the associated retrieved context, leads to unnecessary computational overhead during LLM inference. Existing prompt compression methods typically rely on auxiliary small language models (SLMs) to estimate context importance. However, such approaches introduce significant memory and computational overhead, which limits their deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. In this paper, we propose CORE, a two-stage sentence-level prompt compression method that eliminates the need for SLMs. In the first stage, CORE constructs an answer set via named entity recognition (NER) and a clue set via semantic matching. In the second stage, CORE refines the clue set using an orthogonal residual retrieval strategy and designs a spatial proximity-based metric to filter the answer set. The two sets are then combined to form the final compressed context. We implement CORE on an NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin edge device and a Huawei Nova smartphone. Experimental results demonstrate that within a 2000-token budget, CORE improves accuracy by at least 30.19% compared to state-of-the-art baselines, while reducing memory usage by at least 50.47% and achieving at least 1.94 times speedup on the edge device. Moreover, compared to the state-of-the-art LLMLingua2 method, CORE achieves a substantial energy reduction of 95.74% on the smartphone, highlighting its practicality and generalizability for mobile deployments.
title_es: CORE: compresión de prompts para dispositivos edge
bajada: Investigadores propusieron CORE, un método ligero de compresión de prompts que no requiere modelos de lenguaje auxiliares. La solución es ideal para aplicaciones QA con RAG en dispositivos con recursos limitados, reduciendo sobrecarga computacional sin sacrificar calidad.
bajada_en: Researchers proposed CORE, a lightweight prompt compression method that doesn't require auxiliary language models. The solution is ideal for RAG-based QA applications on resource-constrained edge devices, reducing computational overhead without sacrificing quality.

title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
summary: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.
title_es: Claude Tag trae IA persistente a Slack para equipos
bajada: Anthropic lanzó Claude Tag, una integración que permite usar Claude como miembro del equipo en Slack. Más allá de productividad, la herramienta es un movimiento estratégico para capturar contexto organizacional, conocimiento institucional y flujos de trabajo empresariales.
bajada_en: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, allowing teams to use Claude as a Slack team member. Beyond productivity gains, it's a strategic move to capture organizational context and enterprise workflows—Anthropic's own product team already creates 65% of code with it.

title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.
title_es: GPT-5 resuelve misterio inmunológico de 3 años
bajada: GPT-5 Pro ayudó a desvelar un enigma sobre el comportamiento de células T que llevaba 3 años sin resolverse. El descubrimiento podría acelerar investigaciones en cáncer e inmunología, demostrando el potencial de los LLM en investigación científica.
bajada_en: GPT-5 Pro helped unravel a 3-year immunology mystery about T cell behavior. The breakthrough could accelerate cancer and autoimmune research, demonstrating LLMs' potential in scientific research.

title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
title_es: OpenAI promueve estándares compartidos para IA avanzada
bajada: OpenAI colabora en la construcción de estándares globales para IA a través de marcos de evaluación, prácticas de seguridad y cooperación internacional. El movimiento busca establecer criterios comunes en la industria para evaluación y seguridad de sistemas avanzados.
bajada_en: OpenAI is collaborating to build shared global standards for advanced AI through evaluation frameworks and safety practices. The initiative aims to establish common industry criteria for advanced system assessment and security.

title: Executive order bumps up deadline to move off quantum-vulnerable crypto
summary: Order warns of national security risks if post-quantum cryptography isn't adopted in time.
title_es: EEUU acelera transición a criptografía resistente a quantum
bajada: Una orden ejecutiva acorta el plazo para abandonar criptografía vulnerable a ataques cuánticos por razones de seguridad nacional. El cambio afecta la infraestructura digital de EEUU y establece urgencia en la adopción de post-quantum cryptography.
bajada_en: An executive order accelerates the deadline for moving away from quantum-vulnerable cryptography due to national security concerns. The shift affects US digital infrastructure and creates urgency around post-quantum cryptography adoption.

title: ProductJun 23, 2026Introducing Claude TagClaude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
summary: Product Introducing Claude Tag Jun 23, 2026 Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. We’re starting on Slack, which Claude can join as a team member. Grant Claude access to selected channels, and connect it to whichever tools, data—and even codebases—you choose. Then, anyone in the channel can tag @Claude in, and delegate tasks to it while they focus on other work. Claude builds context by remembering relevant information from the channels it’s in, and can plan out tasks to complete in the future. We see Claude Tag as the beginning of an evolution of Claude Code: it makes the model even more proactive, and it works better with a full team. Tagging @Claude is now one of the main ways we get things done at Anthropic. Today, 65% of our product team’s code is created by our internal version of Claude Tag. The same pattern is now spreading well beyond engineering—we’re tagging Claude to chase down product metrics and data, work through support tickets, or even help find the root cause of tricky bugs. We’re launching Claude Tag on Slack, since it’s a natural home for collaborative work between teams and AI, and where much of Anthropic’s day-to-day work already happens. It’s available today in beta for Claude Enterprise and Team customers. Our goal is to expand where it’s available more widely, so that teams can tag @Claude in the many other places they work. Working with @Claude If you’ve worked with Claude Code or Cowork before, Claude Tag will feel familiar. Tag @Claude with a request in simple terms and it’ll break its task down into stages and then work through them in turn, using the tools it has access to. Once it’s done, it’ll respond in a Slack thread with what it’s created. But tagging Claude comes with a few new advantages: @Claude is multiplayer. Within a given Slack channel, there’s one Claude that interacts with everyone. This means that anyone can see what it’s working on, and can pick up the conversation from where the last person left off. Th
title_es: ProductJun 23, 2026Introducing Claude TagClaude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude.
bajada: Product Introducing Claude Tag Jun 23, 2026 Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. We’re starting on Slack, which Claude can join as a team member. Grant Claude access to selected chan

title: Experimenting with the proposed Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js
title_es: Transformers.js experimenta con API de almacenamiento cross-origin
bajada: Hugging Face prueba la Cross-Origin Storage API en Transformers.js para mejorar capacidades de persistencia en modelos del lado del cliente. La experimentación busca optimizar cómo se almacenan datos en navegadores al ejecutar modelos localmente.
bajada_en: Hugging Face is experimenting with Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js to improve client-side model persistence. The work aims to optimize how data is stored in browsers when running models locally.

title: Oracle’s 21,000 layoffs help drive its debt-fueled AI investments
summary: Oracle is spending billions on data center infrastructure to support AI.
title_es: Oracle invierte miles de millones en IA con despidos de 21k
bajada: Oracle usa ahorros de 21,000 despidos para financiar inversiones en infraestructura de data centers para IA. La estrategia refleja cómo las grandes empresas tech están reorganizando recursos hacia iniciativas de inteligencia artificial.
bajada_en: Oracle is using savings from 21,000 layoffs to fund billions in data center infrastructure for AI. The move reflects how major tech companies are redirecting resources toward AI initiatives.

title: Something’s off with Midjourney’s pivot to body scanners
summary: Last week, Midjourney, an AI startup best known for its image generator, made an unusual pivot: medical imaging. The company announced a futuristic ultrasound scanner that would dunk users into a vat of water and, hopefully, produce "something as powerful as MRI" yet "as casual as a trip to the spa." Midjourney says the goal […]
title_es: Midjourney se diversifica en imagenología médica sin evidencia sólida
bajada: Midjourney anunció un inesperado pivote hacia imagenología médica con un escáner ultrasónico futurista. El movimiento genera interrogantes por falta de evidencia científica que respalde las capacidades prometidas y su comparación con MRI.
bajada_en: Midjourney announced an unusual pivot into medical imaging with a futuristic ultrasound scanner. The move raises concerns due to lack of scientific evidence supporting its promised capabilities compared to MRI technology.

title: AI's Affordability Crisis
summary: Article URL:https://blog.dshr.org/2026/06/ais-affordability-crisis.htmlComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48646276Points: 212# Comments: 273
title_es: La crisis de asequibilidad de la IA en debate
bajada: Un artículo en Hacker News analiza los desafíos de accesibilidad económica en sistemas de IA, generando amplia discusión sobre costos de entrenamiento e inferencia. La conversación refleja preocupaciones sobre democratización de tecnología IA en la comunidad tech.
bajada_en: A Hacker News discussion analyzes the affordability challenges of AI systems, sparking debate about training and inference costs. The conversation reflects community concerns about AI technology democratization.
